meta.title: BitcoinVN Lightning - Instant Bitcoin Payments
meta.description: BitcoinVN operates a premier Lightning node - powering fast BTC-to-VND settlements across Vietnam.

hero.description: Instant and private Bitcoin payments with near-zero fees. Swap instantly to and from any supported asset on BitcoinVN.

about.title: Bitcoin's
paragraphs: Bitcoin is the world's most trusted cryptocurrency - but its base layer handles only ~7 transactions per second to preserve decentralization.
The Lightning Network is a Layer 2 protocol that creates payment channels between users, enabling millions of transactions per second while final settlement remains secured by the Bitcoin blockchain.
about.highlight: Payment data stays between peers. The Bitcoin blockchain serves only as the final settlement layer - preserving speed and privacy.

benefits.title: Unlock the Full Power of
benefits.description: Enhanced scalability and privacy while keeping Bitcoin's base layer secure.

items.title: Instant Transactions
items.description: Settle in milliseconds - no block confirmations needed. Ideal for point-of-sale and real-time commerce.

items.title: Near-Zero Fees
items.description: Costs are a fraction of a cent, making micropayments and small transfers viable for the first time.

items.title: Massive Scalability
items.description: Millions of transactions per second across channels - surpassing traditional payment processors.

items.title: Enhanced Privacy
items.description: Transactions stay off-chain between peers. Only final balances hit the blockchain, keeping payment details private.

items.title: Bank Account Funding
items.description: Send Bitcoin via Lightning and receive VND directly in your bank account through BitcoinVN - instantly.

items.title: Global Reach
items.description: Pay anyone, anywhere, instantly. No intermediaries, no borders - pure peer-to-peer value transfer.

steps.title: Open a Channel
steps.description: Lock Bitcoin in a multi-sig address on-chain to create a payment channel. One transaction is all it takes.

steps.title: Transact Instantly
steps.description: Send unlimited payments off-chain in milliseconds. Routed through the network - no miners, no waiting.

steps.title: Settle On-Chain
steps.description: Close the channel anytime. Final balances settle on-chain, secured by Bitcoin's proof-of-work.

nodeSection.title: BitcoinVN Lightning
nodeSection.description: Enterprise-grade Lightning infrastructure. Whitelist access since Oct 2023.
nodeSection.footerText: Contact us via Twitter or email to get whitelisted.

useCases.title: Built for
useCases.description: From retail to remittances - Lightning powers next-generation Bitcoin commerce.

items.title: Point-of-Sale Payments
items.description: Accept Bitcoin with instant settlement. No chargebacks, no processing delays.

items.title: Cross-Border Remittances
items.description: Send money across borders in seconds at a fraction of wire transfer costs.

items.title: API & Developer Integrations
items.description: Integrate Lightning payments into your app. Programmable money for modern fintech.

items.title: Micropayments & Streaming
items.description: Pay per article, per second, or per API call. Sub-cent transactions, finally viable.

cta.description: Fund your Vietnamese bank account in seconds - the fastest BTC settlement in the market.

footer.description: Vietnam's leading Bitcoin exchange and Lightning infrastructure. Trusted since 2014.
